item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p07","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant immediately brakes the requested new transfer channel, identifies this as the fourth local routing/queue split after timeout, missing documents, compensation dispute, and transfer dispute, and moves upstream to main process routing, ownership, escalation, and intake rules. It proposes a temporary emergency-only gate with automatic closure plus unified routing-rule consolidation, so it avoids the fail signal of simply adding another permanent channel."}
